Project.NAME: video2pptx
Project.keywords: video, slides, markdown, presentation, open-cv, computer-vision, slide-detection, subtitle-alignment, srt, vtt, marp, llm, lm-studio, vision, gui, pyside6, project, timeline, video-player, subtitle-overlay, smart-snap
Project.annotation: Automatically extract slide intervals from educational videos, link to SRT/VTT subtitles, enhance with LLM vision analysis, export presentations, manage projects via GUI/CLI, with video player, subtitle overlay, interactive timeline, and smart manual marker snapping.

M-MODELS.NAME: Models
M-MODELS.purpose: Pydantic data models for slides document

type-SlidesDocument.PURPOSE: Root document containing all slide segments

type-SlideSegment.PURPOSE: Single slide interval with stable persisted uid, transcript, image, and metadata

type-SubtitleCue.PURPOSE: Single subtitle entry with time and text

M-CLI.NAME: CLI
M-CLI.purpose: Typer CLI entry point for detect, detect-slides, notes, roi-tool, project, export-md, export-pptx, debug, llm-process commands

fn-detect.PURPOSE: All-in-one: video + optional subtitles → slides.json + images + optional exports

fn-detect_slides.PURPOSE: Standalone: video only → slides.json + screenshots, no subtitles

fn-roi_tool_cmd.PURPOSE: GUI: video frame → mouse drag rect → ignore-roi coordinates

fn-project_create.PURPOSE: CLI: create new project with video/subtitle paths

fn-project_open.PURPOSE: CLI: open existing project and print info

fn-project_info.PURPOSE: CLI: show project state and settings

fn-export_md.PURPOSE: Export slides.json to Marp Markdown presentation

fn-llm_process.PURPOSE: Enrich slides.json with LLM vision analysis and corrected transcript

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Configuration loading — YAML file + CLI arg merge

M-VIDEO-DECODE.NAME: VideoDecode
M-VIDEO-DECODE.purpose: Video frame decoding and sampling at given fps with multi-backend support

M-ROI.NAME: ROI
M-ROI.purpose: Slide ROI management — crop and mask ignore regions

M-FRAME-FEATURES.NAME: FrameFeatures
M-FRAME-FEATURES.purpose: Frame feature extraction: pHash, dHash, histogram, grayscale, pixel MAE, visual distance, quick_extract/quick_visual_distance for fast preview

fn-extract_features.PURPOSE: Full feature extraction: pHash, dHash, hist, gray_thumb

fn-quick_extract.PURPOSE: Lightweight: 32x24 gray thumbnail only, no hashes/histograms

fn-quick_visual_distance.PURPOSE: Pixel MAE between two quick_extract thumbnails

fn-compute_threshold.PURPOSE: Auto threshold from score distribution: median + k*MAD

M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.NAME: SlideDetector
M-SLIDE-DETECTOR.purpose: Slide change detection via frame comparison with threshold and debounce

M-SEGMENTER.NAME: Segmenter
M-SEGMENTER.purpose: Convert change events to slide intervals with representative timestamps

M-DEDUPE.NAME: Dedupe
M-DEDUPE.purpose: Deduplicate adjacent slide segments via hash/SSIM similarity

M-SUBTITLES.NAME: Subtitles
M-SUBTITLES.purpose: SRT/VTT parsing and alignment of cues to slide intervals

M-PPTX-EXPORT.NAME: PptxExport
M-PPTX-EXPORT.purpose: Export slides.json to PPTX with slide images and speaker notes

M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.NAME: NotesProcessor
M-NOTES-PROCESSOR.purpose: Process raw transcript into clean speaker notes: basic cleanup or LLM rephrase

M-DEBUG-EXPORT.NAME: DebugExport
M-DEBUG-EXPORT.purpose: Generate debug artifacts: diff_scores.csv, timeline.png, contact_sheet.jpg

M-LLM-CLIENT.NAME: LlmClient
M-LLM-CLIENT.purpose: OpenAI-compatible LLM client with vision support, model lifecycle management

M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.NAME: SlideAnalyzer
M-SLIDE-ANALYZER.purpose: Analyze slide screenshot via LLM vision: description + key terms extraction

M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.NAME: LlmOrchestrator
M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR.purpose: Orchestrate LLM pipeline: load model → analyze slides → rephrase → unload → save

M-PIPELINE.NAME: PipelineOrchestrator
M-PIPELINE.purpose: Wire all modules in CLI detect (all-in-one mode)

M-DETECT-SLIDES.NAME: DetectSlides
M-DETECT-SLIDES.purpose: Standalone slide detection: video → slides.json + screenshots, no subtitles
M-DETECT-SLIDES.depends: M-VIDEO-DECODE, M-SLIDE-DETECTOR, M-SEGMENTER, M-DEDUPE, M-ROI, M-MODELS

M-NOTES.NAME: Notes
M-NOTES.purpose: Post-process notes: slides.json + subtitles → cleaned notes, no video re-decode

M-ROI-TOOL.NAME: RoiTool
M-ROI-TOOL.purpose: Graphical ROI selector: video frame → mouse drag → ignore-roi coordinates

M-PROJECT.NAME: ProjectManager
M-PROJECT.purpose: Project management: create, open, save project.json with configs and pipeline state

fn-create_project.PURPOSE: Create project directory and project.json with given parameters

fn-open_project.PURPOSE: Load project.json, validate, return Project object

fn-update_project_state.PURPOSE: Update state flags after pipeline steps

M-GUI-MAIN.NAME: MainWindow
M-GUI-MAIN.purpose: Main GUI window with project management, video/backend selection, Detect/QuickDetect buttons, Export dropdown, Save button, manual slides, subtitle editor, timeline3, status bar manager
M-GUI-MAIN.depends: M-PROJECT, M-GUI-TIMELINE3, M-GUI-SETTINGS, M-GUI-WORKER, M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-NOTES, M-BACKENDS, M-GUI-SETTINGS-PROJECT, M-GUI-STATUS, M-GUI-SUBTITLE-EDITOR

type-MainWindow.PURPOSE: QMainWindow with toolbar, File/Edit menus, video player, timeline3, status bar

fn-_on_detect.PURPOSE: Full detection (3 passes, pHash+hist) in QThread

fn-_on_quick_detect.PURPOSE: Quick detection (keyframes + pixel MAE) in QThread, saves slides.json + screenshots

fn-_on_add_manual_slide.PURPOSE: Create SlideSegment(manual=True) at timestamp, insert into project.slides

fn-_on_export_md.PURPOSE: Export slides.json → deck.md, offer to open file

fn-_on_export_pptx.PURPOSE: Export slides.json → deck.pptx, offer to open file

fn-_on_process_notes.PURPOSE: Run NotesWorker + notes pipeline (basic or LLM mode)

fn-_on_open_subtitle_editor.PURPOSE: Open SubtitleEditorDialog for a slide with raw cues + LLM

fn-_on_video_duration_changed.PURPOSE: Update timeline duration + zoom_fit on video load

fn-_on_seek_to_marker.PURPOSE: Seek video to timestamp + briefly play+pause to show frame

fn-_on_detect_finished.PURPOSE: Signal: reload slides into timeline, enable export/notes buttons

M-GUI-TIMELINE.NAME: TimelineWidget
M-GUI-TIMELINE.purpose: Custom timeline widget: QPainter-drawn time axis with colored slide blocks, click-to-select, subtitle panel

fn-TimelineWidget.PURPOSE: Custom QWidget rendering slide intervals as colored blocks on a time axis

signal-selected_slide_changed.PURPOSE: Emitted when user clicks a slide block, passes segment index

fn-SubtitlePanel.PURPOSE: QWidget showing subtitle text for selected slide with Process LLM button

M-GUI-SETTINGS.NAME: SettingsDialog
M-GUI-SETTINGS.purpose: Settings dialog with tabs for LLM prompt, GPU/Backend, and Detection configuration

fn-SettingsDialog.PURPOSE: QDialog with QTabWidget for LLM, GPU/Backend, Detection tabs

tab-LLM.PURPOSE: Editable system prompt field, model name, base URL

tab-GPUBackend.PURPOSE: Radio buttons for backend selection, CUDA availability info

tab-Detection.PURPOSE: Threshold, min slide duration, min stable duration, ROI fields

M-GUI-WORKER.NAME: Workers
M-GUI-WORKER.purpose: QThread-based background workers for detect, quick-detect, notes, and LLM operations with progress signaling
M-GUI-WORKER.depends: M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-NOTES, M-LLM-ORCHESTRATOR, M-PROJECT, M-FRAME-FEATURES, M-VIDEO-DECODE

type-DetectWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs detect-slides on project, emits progress/finished/error

type-QuickDetectWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: keyframes + pixel MAE → slides.json + screenshots (quick_mode=True)

type-NotesWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs notes pipeline on project

type-LlmWorker.PURPOSE: QObject worker: runs LLM enrichment on project

signal-progress.PURPOSE: emitted (int percent, str status_message) during operation

M-GUI-APPCONFIG.NAME: AppConfigManager
M-GUI-APPCONFIG.purpose: App-wide configuration persistence: load/save app-config.yaml in platform config dir. Fields: LLM model/base_url/context_length, GPU backend, snap_mode, snap_flat_threshold, default_project_dir.

fn-load_app_config.PURPOSE: Load app-config.yaml, return AppConfigModel with defaults for missing fields

fn-apply_defaults_to_project.PURPOSE: Inherit app config defaults into a new Project object

type-AppConfigModel.PURPOSE: Pydantic model with LLM, GPU, snap, defaults fields

M-GUI-STATUS.NAME: StatusBarManager
M-GUI-STATUS.purpose: QMainWindow status bar helper — progress, elapsed time, ETA for long operations

fn-StatusBarManager.PURPOSE: start/update/finish lifecycle with formatted progress string

fn-start.PURPOSE: Show starting message, record start time

fn-update.PURPOSE: Show pct, elapsed, ETA, optional message

fn-finish.PURPOSE: Show completion message with elapsed time

M-GUI-SUBTITLE-EDITOR.NAME: SubtitleEditor
M-GUI-SUBTITLE-EDITOR.purpose: QDialog for editing slide subtitles with LLM vision analysis and transcript correction

fn-SubtitleEditorDialog.PURPOSE: QDialog with screenshot, raw subtitles, transcript, LLM Process button

fn-_on_llm_process.PURPOSE: Run vision analysis + transcript correction using LlmClient

M-GUI-SMART-SNAP.NAME: SmartSnap
M-GUI-SMART-SNAP.purpose: Smart snap strategies for manual markers: diff_only, fallback_analyze, hybrid. Find nearest scene boundary within configurable window.

fn-smart_snap.PURPOSE: Main entry: snap_mode dispatch to diff_only / fallback_analyze / hybrid

fn-_snap_diff_only.PURPOSE: Find nearest local max in existing diff_scores ±5s window

fn-_snap_fallback_analyze.PURPOSE: Diff scores if available, otherwise decode ±3s window at sample_fps=5

fn-_snap_hybrid.PURPOSE: Diff scores if available and non-flat, otherwise high-res analysis ±2s sample_fps=10

fn-_find_peak_in_window.PURPOSE: Helper: find index of max value in array within timestamp range

M-GUI-MARKER-MANAGER.NAME: MarkerManager
M-GUI-MARKER-MANAGER.purpose: CRUD for user-defined blue markers on Project. Persisted in project.json. Calls SmartSnap on creation. Stores both original and snapped timestamps.

fn-add_marker.PURPOSE: Create marker at timestamp, snap it, store in project.json

fn-delete_marker.PURPOSE: Remove marker by timestamp from project.json

fn-get_markers.PURPOSE: Return list of {original, snapped, snap_mode} from project

fn-resnap_marker.PURPOSE: Re-run snap on existing marker with current settings

type-MarkerEntry.PURPOSE: Dict with original_ts, snapped_ts, snap_mode fields

M-GUI-SETTINGS-PROJECT.NAME: ProjectSettingsDialog
M-GUI-SETTINGS-PROJECT.purpose: Project Settings QDialog: ROI, ignore_rois, threshold, sample_fps, min_slide_duration, dedupe, min_stable_duration. Read/write via project.json.

fn-ProjectSettingsDialog.PURPOSE: QDialog with form fields for detection parameters

M-GUI-SETTINGS-APP.NAME: AppSettingsDialog
M-GUI-SETTINGS-APP.purpose: App Settings QDialog: tabs for LLM, GPU/Backend, Snap, Default Paths. Read/write via M-GUI-APPCONFIG.

fn-AppSettingsDialog.PURPOSE: QDialog with QTabWidget for all app-wide settings

tab-LLM.PURPOSE: Model name, base URL, context length fields

M-GUI-VIDEOPLAYER.NAME: VideoPlayer
M-GUI-VIDEOPLAYER.purpose: QMediaPlayer + QGraphicsVideoItem with transport controls, subtitle overlay, keyboard navigation (arrows seek, Space play/pause). Emits positionChanged for subtitle sync.

fn-VideoPlayerWidget.PURPOSE: QWidget with QGraphicsView + QGraphicsVideoItem + transport bar + keyboard seeking

fn-keyPressEvent.PURPOSE: Arrow keys: seek ±5s/±30s (Ctrl), volume ±10%, Space play/pause

fn-seek_relative.PURPOSE: Seek by delta_seconds from current position

M-GUI-SUBTITLE-OVERLAY.NAME: SubtitleOverlay
M-GUI-SUBTITLE-OVERLAY.purpose: Parse SRT/VTT via pysubs2, render subtitle text as QLabel over QVideoWidget. Sync with positionChanged. Hidden when no subtitles or between cues.

fn-SubtitleOverlayWidget.PURPOSE: QLabel subclass positioned over video, updated on positionChanged

fn-_get_cue_at_time.PURPOSE: Return SubtitleCue text for given timestamp or None

M-GUI-TIMELINE-V2.NAME: TimelineV2
M-GUI-TIMELINE-V2.purpose: Enhanced timeline: green (detected) and blue (manual) markers, score waveform graph. Double-click green → open image. Right-click → add/edit/delete marker.

fn-TimelineV2Widget.PURPOSE: Custom QWidget with QPainter timeline + green/blue markers + score waveform

signal-marker_added.PURPOSE: emitted (float timestamp) when user adds blue marker

signal-marker_deleted.PURPOSE: emitted (float timestamp) when user deletes blue marker

signal-open_image.PURPOSE: emitted (str image_path) when green marker double-clicked

fn-set_scores.PURPOSE: Set score waveform data (timestamps, values) for rendering

M-GUI-TIMELINE3.NAME: Timeline3
M-GUI-TIMELINE3.purpose: QGraphicsView-based multi-track timeline: SubtitleBlockItem (click to seek), SlideBlockItem (drag/resize/move), PlayheadItem, TimeRulerItem, waveform track. Dynamic track heights. Manual slides as orange blocks.

type-SlideBlockItem.PURPOSE: Green/orange QGraphicsRectItem with drag edges, Alt+move, Y-lock. Manual slides = orange.

type-SubtitleBlockItem.PURPOSE: Orange interval block, click → seek_requested, Alt+drag to move

type-PlayheadItem.PURPOSE: Red vertical line following playback position

type-TimeRulerItem.PURPOSE: Top ruler with dynamic tick interval based on zoom

fn-TimelineView.PURPOSE: QGraphicsView with wheel zoom, middle-click pan, context menus, seek on click

fn-TimelineWidget.PURPOSE: Top-level container: TrackHeaderPanel + TimelineView + zoom controls

signal-open_image.PURPOSE: emitted (str path, int slide_index) on slide block click

signal-add_manual_slide.PURPOSE: emitted (float ts) when user adds manual slide marker

signal-slide_moved.PURPOSE: emitted (int index, float start, float end) after Alt+drag

signal-slide_resized.PURPOSE: emitted (int index, float start, float end) after edge drag

M-GUI-MENUBAR.NAME: MenuBar
M-GUI-MENUBAR.purpose: QMenuBar with File menu (New/Open/Close/Save Project, Import Video/Subtitles, Exit) and Edit menu (Project Settings, App Settings). Keyboard shortcuts. Emits signals for all actions.

fn-MenuBarWidget.PURPOSE: QMenuBar with File and Edit menus, emits signals for each action

M-GUI-MARKER-PANEL.NAME: MarkerPanel
M-GUI-MARKER-PANEL.purpose: Marker list QDialog with table of blue markers, per-row seek/re-snap/delete actions

fn-MarkerPanel.PURPOSE: QDialog with QTableWidget listing markers; columns: original_ts, snapped_ts, mode, actions

signal-seek_requested.PURPOSE: emitted (float timestamp) when user clicks Seek

signal-marker_deleted.PURPOSE: emitted (float timestamp) when user deletes marker

M-GUI-ROI-SELECTOR.NAME: RoiSelector
M-GUI-ROI-SELECTOR.purpose: Visual ROI selector dialog — user draws rectangles over video frame to define ignore ROIs

fn-RoiSelectorDialog.PURPOSE: Modal QDialog with QRubberBand for drawing rectangles on video frame

type-RectItem.PURPOSE: Helper dataclass for a single ROI rectangle

M-TIMELINE-MODEL.NAME: TimelineModel
M-TIMELINE-MODEL.purpose: QObject-based timeline data model: Clip(ABC), SlideClip, SubtitleClip, MarkerClip, ScoreClip, Track(QObject), ScoreTrack(Track), Timeline(QObject) with signals

type-Clip.PURPOSE: ABC: uid, start_sec, end_sec, duration property, contains(), overlaps()

type-SlideClip.PURPOSE: Clip subclass: index, image_path, transcript, notes, llm_description, manual, to_segment/from_segment, extract_subtitles, process_notes

type-Track.PURPOSE: QObject with clipAdded/Removed/Changed signals, add_clip/remove_clip/sort/reindex, name/height properties

type-ScoreTrack.PURPOSE: Track subclass: min_value, max_value, method, build_waveform_path

M-PROJECT-MODEL.NAME: ProjectModel
M-PROJECT-MODEL.purpose: QObject wrapping project state with Qt signals: slidesChanged, subtitlesChanged, videoChanged, projectClosed, stateChanged. Bridges CLI project_manager with GUI timeline model.

fn-create.PURPOSE: Create new project at path with name

fn-open.PURPOSE: Load project, sync slides/subtitles to timeline, emit videoChanged

fn-add_slide.PURPOSE: Split interval or create manual slide, persist project/slides, and return stable uid

fn-delete_slide.PURPOSE: Remove slide by uid or 1-based index and persist all views

fn-move_slide.PURPOSE: Validate and persist slide interval by uid or 1-based index

fn-resize_slide.PURPOSE: Validate and persist a changed end boundary

fn-set_slide_frame.PURPOSE: Decode and persist a representative frame for a slide

fn-clear_slide_image.PURPOSE: Clear image metadata consistently across project, slides JSON, and timeline

fn-load_subtitles.PURPOSE: Import subtitles, sync to timeline track, emit subtitlesChanged

fn-set_scores.PURPOSE: Store score timestamps+values, sync ScoreTrack, emit scoresChanged

M-GUI-LOG-BRIDGE.NAME: LogBridge
M-GUI-LOG-BRIDGE.purpose: Bridge loguru → Qt signal + ring buffer for DebugDock and MCP server. Singleton pattern via LogBridge.instance().

type-LogBridge.PURPOSE: QObject singleton: newLog Signal(str,str,str), recent(n), _sink(message) captures loguru entries

signal-newLog.PURPOSE: emitted (level, time, message) for each log entry

fn-recent.PURPOSE: Return last N log entries from ring buffer

fn-instance.PURPOSE: classmethod: return singleton, creating it if needed

M-GUI-DEBUG-DOCK.NAME: DebugDock
M-GUI-DEBUG-DOCK.purpose: QDockWidget with LogPanel (live log viewer with color-coded levels + filter) and StatePanel (Timeline→Track→Clip tree view). Toggle via Ctrl+D or View→Debug menu.

type-LogPanel.PURPOSE: QWidget: color-coded QPlainTextEdit, QComboBox level filter, auto-scroll

type-StatePanel.PURPOSE: QWidget: QTreeWidget showing Timeline→Track→Clip hierarchy, Refresh button

M-GUI-SIGNAL-SPY.NAME: SignalSpy
M-GUI-SIGNAL-SPY.purpose: Watch Qt signals on any QObject, log via LogBridge for real-time inspection in DebugDock. Supports individual signal watching and watch_all for complete tracing.

fn-watch.PURPOSE: Subscribe to a named Qt signal, log emission args via loguru→LogBridge

fn-watch_all.PURPOSE: Auto-discover and subscribe to ALL signals on a QObject

M-DEBUG-MCP.NAME: McpServer
M-DEBUG-MCP.purpose: MCP HTTP/SSE server on :9812 for AI agent debugging. Read tools: get_state, get_project, get_logs, get_clip. Write tools via command queue: project_open/close/create/save, slide_add/delete/move. Action tools via ActionRegistry.

fn-_handle_rpc.PURPOSE: Dispatch JSON-RPC methods: tools/list, tools/call, initialize

fn-mcp_process_queue.PURPOSE: Drain command queue + action queue in Qt main thread via QTimer

M-DEBUG-ACTION.NAME: ActionRegistry
M-DEBUG-ACTION.purpose: @mcp_action decorator + ActionRegistry. Auto-discovers MCP tools from decorated methods on any object. Converts Python type hints to JSON inputSchema.

fn-mcp_action.PURPOSE: Decorator: marks a method with _mcp_meta = {name, desc, kind}

type-ActionRegistry.PURPOSE: Registry: scan(instance) finds @mcp_action methods, tools() returns MCP descriptors, call(name, args) invokes with signature binding

fn-scan.PURPOSE: Iterate dir(instance), find methods with _mcp_meta (including bound method __func__)

fn-call.PURPOSE: Lookup method, bind args via inspect.signature, invoke

fn-tools.PURPOSE: Return list of {name, description, inputSchema} for tools/list

M-COLAB.NAME: ColabDeployment
M-COLAB.purpose: Google Colab notebook for running pipeline with free T4 GPU

M-APP-SERVICE.NAME: AppService
M-APP-SERVICE.purpose: Canonical application service — single entry point for GUI slots, MCP tools, and CLI. No Qt, no HTTP.
M-APP-SERVICE.depends: M-DETECT-SLIDES, M-AUTO-ALIGN, M-NOTES, M-MD-EXPORT, M-PPTX-EXPORT, M-PROJECT-VALIDATOR

fn-run_detect.PURPOSE: Canonical slide detection: video → slides.json + screenshots. Marks downstream stale.

fn-run_preview.PURPOSE: Quick preview: diff scores only, no slides, no side-effects.

fn-run_auto.PURPOSE: Full pipeline: detect → align(if subs) → notes → export → save → validate. mode=full|resume|force.

M-AUTO-ALIGN.NAME: AutoAlign
M-AUTO-ALIGN.purpose: Align visual slide boundaries to subtitle anchors via coordinated global choice (DP/sequential with neighbor check), idempotent, with rollback and metrics.

type-AlignmentReport.PURPOSE: Aggregate: boundaries_total/moved, avg/max shift, fallback/failed counts, details

type-AlignmentAnchorProvider.PURPOSE: Protocol: anchors(video_duration) → list[float]. Extensible to AudioVAD/Hybrid.

type-SubtitleAnchorProvider.PURPOSE: Extract candidate anchor times from subtitle cues.

fn-align_slides_to_subtitles.PURPOSE: Main entry: slides + subtitles → aligned slides + AlignmentReport. dry_run/include_manual.

fn-rollback_alignment.PURPOSE: Restore visual boundaries from last alignment_report.json.

M-OPERATION-REGISTRY.NAME: OperationRegistry
M-OPERATION-REGISTRY.purpose: Operation lifecycle registry for MCP async ops — tracks queued/running/succeeded/failed/cancelled with timestamps, progress, trace_id.

fn-create.PURPOSE: Register new op, status=queued, return Operation

M-STRUCTURED-ERRORS.NAME: StructuredErrors
M-STRUCTURED-ERRORS.purpose: Typed operation error: type/message/stage/recoverable/trace_id/details. Full traceback to log; never swallow exceptions.

type-OperationError.PURPOSE: Typed error envelope returned in failed operation result

M-CONFIRM-POLICY.NAME: ConfirmPolicy
M-CONFIRM-POLICY.purpose: Destructive-op confirmation: require explicit confirm=true. VIDEO2PPTX_TEST_MODE=1 still needs explicit args. No global auto-confirm.

fn-require_confirm.PURPOSE: Raise ConfirmRequiredError if destructive op lacks confirm=true

M-ATOMIC-JSON.NAME: AtomicJson
M-ATOMIC-JSON.purpose: Atomic JSON writer: temp file + os.replace. Used for all project/slides/alignment writes to prevent partial-file corruption.

fn-write_json_atomic.PURPOSE: Write obj as JSON to temp in same dir, then os.replace to target

M-MCP-OPERATIONS.NAME: McpOperations
M-MCP-OPERATIONS.purpose: Wire OperationRegistry into MCP: write tools create op → run app_service in dedicated OpRunnerThread → return operation_id. Lifecycle tools: health/get_capabilities/get_operation/wait_operation/cancel_operation/list_operations.

type-AppServiceRunner.PURPOSE: Maps MCP tools to application commands; temporary result persistence bridge until Phase-16 Step 5

type-OpRunnerThread.PURPOSE: Dedicated thread draining operation queue; calls app_service; updates op status

fn-wait-operation.PURPOSE: Wait for terminal operation and required Qt completion synchronization

fn-get_ui_state.PURPOSE: Window title, status, busy, button visibility/enabled/text map

fn-get_timeline.PURPOSE: Slide/subtitle/score tracks with UID, intervals, manual, image_path

M-MCP-WRITE-TOOLS.NAME: McpWriteTools
M-MCP-WRITE-TOOLS.purpose: Full write tool set: project/video/subtitle/preview/detect/align/notes/llm/export/auto/slide-CRUD/video-transport/settings/app_shutdown. Each delegates to app_service; enforces confirm for destructive.

M-UI-STATE-READER.NAME: UiStateReader
M-UI-STATE-READER.purpose: Read-only snapshot of MainWindow: buttons (visible/enabled/text), window title, status text, busy flag, current_operation. No business logic.

fn-read_ui_state.PURPOSE: Return dict of button states + window metadata

M-PROJECT-VALIDATOR.NAME: ProjectValidator
M-PROJECT-VALIDATOR.purpose: validate_project: schema, file existence, interval invariants, no double paths, slide-count consistency, export freshness, MD/PPTX integrity, pipeline state, alignment report. Returns {valid, errors, warnings, statistics}.

type-ValidationResult.PURPOSE: {valid: bool, errors: list, warnings: list, statistics: dict}

M-PIPELINE-STATES.NAME: PipelineStates
M-PIPELINE-STATES.purpose: Extend ProjectState flags: preview_done/detect_done/align_done/notes_done/md_exported/pptx_exported/auto_done + per-stage stale booleans for downstream invalidation.

M-CANONICAL-COMMANDS.NAME: CommandRouter
M-CANONICAL-COMMANDS.purpose: Unify slide_add/slide_add_ui/slide_move/slide_moved into one canonical path. Public 1-based slide_index, internal 0-based, uid preferred. GUI/MCP/CLI → router → ProjectModel.

fn-slide_delete.PURPOSE: Canonical delete by uid or 1-based index

fn-slide_set_frame.PURPOSE: Capture current video frame as slide image

M-GUI-PROJECT-CTRL.NAME: ProjectController
M-GUI-PROJECT-CTRL.purpose: Canonical GUI project-state owner: create/open/reload/save/close via FileProjectRepository and emit loaded state only after the canonical snapshot is current.

M-GUI-PIPELINE-CTRL.NAME: PipelineController
M-GUI-PIPELINE-CTRL.purpose: Schedule stage services through operation-scoped ApplicationServices in QThread with queued progress, cancellation, completion, and error signals.
M-GUI-PIPELINE-CTRL.depends: M-GUI-PIPELINE-WORKER, M-APP-BOOTSTRAP, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-AUTO

M-GUI-TIMELINE-CTRL.NAME: TimelineController
M-GUI-TIMELINE-CTRL.purpose: Perform revision-safe slide mutations by SlideId only, including canonical ArtifactRef image assignment.

M-GUI-PIPELINE-WORKER.NAME: GuiPipelineWorker
M-GUI-PIPELINE-WORKER.purpose: Execute one operation-scoped ApplicationServices stage on a QThread without blocking Qt's main thread.

M-GUI-WINDOW-UI.NAME: MainWindowUiBuilder
M-GUI-WINDOW-UI.purpose: Build MainWindow UI and optional host adapters while keeping lifecycle and pipeline logic outside construction code.

M-GUI-CANONICAL-BUTTONS.NAME: CanonicalButtons
M-GUI-CANONICAL-BUTTONS.purpose: Rename/wire 5 distinct stages: Quick Preview / Detect / Auto Align / Process Notes / Auto. Each button slot delegates to app_service — no business logic in slots.

M-MCP-RELIABILITY.NAME: McpReliability
M-MCP-RELIABILITY.purpose: Harden McpServer: port 9812–9816 fallback, stale .mcp_port cleanup, registry clear on restart, SSE client stop, localhost-only bind, live serverInfo version, graceful shutdown.

M-E2E-RUNNER.NAME: McpE2eRunner
M-E2E-RUNNER.purpose: Headless E2E runner: launch GUI subprocess, find port, initialize, run scenarios with before/after snapshots + wait_operation, emit HTML/JSON/junit report. No fixed sleeps.

M-E2E-SNAPSHOT.NAME: Snapshot
M-E2E-SNAPSHOT.purpose: Capture full state snapshot: get_app_state/get_ui_state/get_project/get_timeline/list_artifacts/logs/screenshot + copy project.json/slides.json for diff.

M-E2E-SCENARIOS.NAME: E2eScenarios
M-E2E-SCENARIOS.purpose: pytest E2E-001..015 happy + E2E-101..119 negative, each with before/after snapshot, postcondition assertions, 4-view consistency check.

CrossLink.relation: emits signals for add_manual_slide, seek, open_image
QuickDetectWorker uses quick_mode=True for fast detection
runs LLM processing in background thread
PreviewWorker uses for fast frame iteration
wraps Project lifecycle, delegates to project_manager
owns Timeline, syncs slides/subtitles/scores to tracks
added as QDockWidget, toggled via Ctrl+D
reads ProjectModel for get_project, write tools via command queue
delegates passive UI construction and MCP/debug hosting
mutates slides by SlideId and persists ArtifactRef images

M-APP-INPUT-RESOLVER.NAME: InputResolver
M-APP-INPUT-RESOLVER.purpose: Common input resolution helpers for project-bound operations: resolve_project_input, resolve_project_path, resolve_detection_override, normalize_roi.

M-PERSIST-DETECTION.NAME: DetectionConfigPersistence
M-PERSIST-DETECTION.purpose: Canonical DetectionConfigDocument in schema 2.0 with to_domain/to_document round-trip and legacy migration.

M-APP-IDENTITY.NAME: ApplicationIdentity
M-APP-IDENTITY.purpose: Canonical application identity: version, build SHA, repository, runtime info. Single source of product metadata.

M-APP-BUILD-META.NAME: BuildMeta
M-APP-BUILD-META.purpose: Build-time injected metadata (commit SHA, build type). Overwritten by CI/CD pipeline.

M-GUI-ABOUT.NAME: AboutDialog
M-GUI-ABOUT.purpose: About dialog with version, build SHA, runtime capabilities, diagnostic info copy, GitHub/logs actions.

M-GUI-HELP-MENU.NAME: HelpMenu
M-GUI-HELP-MENU.purpose: Help menu: About, Check for Updates, Open Logs, GitHub Repository.

M-DESKTOP-BOOTSTRAP.NAME: DesktopBootstrap
M-DESKTOP-BOOTSTRAP.purpose: Canonical desktop GUI entry point for source and packaged modes.

M-DETECT-METRICS.NAME: DetectMetrics
M-DETECT-METRICS.purpose: Low-overhead aggregated performance telemetry (timers, counters, gauges) for detector runs. JSON serializable, zero-cost when disabled.

M-ARCH-OVERVIEW.NAME: ArchitectureOverview
M-ARCH-OVERVIEW.purpose: Target layered architecture: domain/application/infrastructure/adapters with ports and dependency rules. See docs/architecture.md for full context.

type-DomainLayer.PURPOSE: PySide6-free domain: Project aggregate, Slide entity, TimeInterval, PipelineState, events, exceptions

type-ApplicationLayer.PURPOSE: PySide6-free application: Commands, Services (use cases), DTOs, Ports (Protocols)

type-InfrastructureLayer.PURPOSE: Persistence, video decoder, subtitle parser, exporters, LLM client implementations

type-AdapterLayer.PURPOSE: GUI (thin MainWindow + controllers), MCP (explicit handler registry), CLI (Typer → commands)

M-DOMAIN-VALUE.NAME: ValueObjects
M-DOMAIN-VALUE.purpose: Frozen value objects: SlideId, TimeInterval (validated), ArtifactRef (normalized relative path), PipelineState enum

M-DOMAIN-PROJECT.NAME: ProjectAggregate
M-DOMAIN-PROJECT.purpose: Project aggregate root controlling slide invariants, downstream invalidation, state transitions, and side-effect-free validation. Canonical source of truth.

fn-validate.PURPOSE: Check complete aggregate invariants without mutation

M-DOMAIN-SLIDE.NAME: SlideEntity
M-DOMAIN-SLIDE.purpose: Slide entity with stable SlideId, visual/aligned TimeInterval, image ArtifactRef, transcript, confidence, manual flag

M-DOMAIN-EVENTS.NAME: DomainEvents
M-DOMAIN-EVENTS.purpose: Domain event dataclasses: ProjectCreated, SlidesDetected, SlidesAligned, NotesProcessed, SlideAdded, etc.

M-ADAPTERS.NAME: LegacyPortAdapters
M-ADAPTERS.purpose: Translate Phase 16 port contracts to legacy CV, alignment, notes, and export functions.

M-MCP-ADAPTER.NAME: McpServiceAdapter
M-MCP-ADAPTER.purpose: Map MCP tool arguments and results to Phase 16 Application Services without legacy pipeline dispatch.
M-MCP-ADAPTER.depends: M-MCP-COMPOSITION, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-AUTO

M-MCP-COMPOSITION.NAME: McpComposition
M-MCP-COMPOSITION.purpose: Wire application services to FileProjectRepository and concrete legacy port adapters.
M-MCP-COMPOSITION.depends: M-ADAPTERS, M-FILE-REPO, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-AUTO

M-CLI-ADAPTER.NAME: CliAdapter
M-CLI-ADAPTER.purpose: Thin Typer transport adapter over operation-scoped canonical application services.
M-CLI-ADAPTER.depends: M-APP-BOOTSTRAP, M-APP-PREVIEW, M-APP-DETECT, M-APP-ALIGN, M-APP-NOTES, M-APP-EXPORT, M-APP-VALIDATE, M-APP-AUTO

M-APP-BOOTSTRAP.NAME: ApplicationServicesBootstrap
M-APP-BOOTSTRAP.purpose: Build one service bundle and operation-scoped context shared by CLI and MCP.

M-APP-LLM.NAME: LlmEnrichmentService
M-APP-LLM.purpose: Canonical explicit LLM enrichment use case with no silent basic-mode fallback.

M-PORT-LLM.NAME: LlmEnricherPort
M-PORT-LLM.purpose: Enrich immutable slide snapshots and return descriptions/transcripts without persistence.

M-APP-PROJECT.name: ProjectService
M-APP-PROJECT.purpose: Create, open, close, save project via repository port. No direct file access.

M-APP-DETECT.name: DetectionService
M-APP-DETECT.purpose: Run full or preview detection via strategy. Project invariant enforcement. Single canonical detect path.

M-APP-ALIGN.name: AlignmentService
M-APP-ALIGN.purpose: Align visual boundaries to subtitle anchors via strategy + anchor provider.

M-APP-AUTO.name: AutoService
M-APP-AUTO.purpose: Coordinate full/resume/force by composing stage services without duplicating stage algorithms.

M-APP-NOTES.NAME: NotesService
M-APP-NOTES.purpose: Canonical basic/LLM notes use case preserving raw cues and forbidding silent LLM fallback.

M-APP-EXPORT.NAME: ExportService
M-APP-EXPORT.purpose: Canonical staged Markdown/PPTX exports from immutable aggregate snapshots with output validation.

M-APP-VALIDATE.NAME: ValidationService
M-APP-VALIDATE.purpose: Validate storage, aggregate, media, artifacts, exports, and derived revision consistency.

M-PORT-REPO.name: ProjectRepository
M-PORT-REPO.purpose: Revision-aware port for loading/saving Project aggregate through LoadedProject and SaveResult.

type-LoadedProject.PURPOSE: Aggregate plus runtime location, canonical revision, warnings, and migration flag

type-SaveResult.PURPOSE: New canonical revision and non-fatal save warnings

fn-load.PURPOSE: Return strict or migrated LoadedProject without persistence-side business mutation

fn-save.PURPOSE: Commit strict V2 state using optional expected revision

M-PERSIST-DTO.NAME: PersistenceDtoV2
M-PERSIST-DTO.purpose: Strict schema 2.0 DTO with full pipeline, portable artifacts, extensions, and revision.

type-ProjectDocumentV2.PURPOSE: Canonical project document; rejects output_dir and unknown fields outside extensions

type-PipelineDocument.PURPOSE: Exact complete state for all canonical pipeline stages

type-StageStateDocument.PURPOSE: Status, operation ID, timestamps, and structured error for one stage

type-SlideDocument.PURPOSE: Strict slide entity data with portable image reference

type-ScoreDocument.PURPOSE: Paired finite monotonic waveform timestamps and values

M-PERSIST-MIGRATIONS.NAME: PersistenceMigrations
M-PERSIST-MIGRATIONS.purpose: Deterministic schema 1.0 → 2.0 migration preserving unknown legacy fields and stable UIDs.

fn-migrate_v1_to_v2.PURPOSE: Deterministically build strict V2 data and preserve legacy extensions without output_dir

fn-ProjectMapper-to_domain.PURPOSE: Rehydrate complete aggregate state without lifecycle transitions or invalidation

fn-ProjectMapper-to_document.PURPOSE: Project aggregate, artifacts, extensions, and full pipeline into strict V2 data

M-FILE-REPO.NAME: FileProjectRepository
M-FILE-REPO.purpose: Canonical atomic commit with revisioned derived slides artifact, strict validation, optimistic concurrency.

fn-create.PURPOSE: Create canonical storage and return first LoadedProject revision unit

fn-load.PURPOSE: Dispatch raw legacy migration or strict V2 parsing

fn-save.PURPOSE: Validate aggregate, reject corrupt/conflicting state, commit canonical V2, then revisioned derived data

fn-validate_storage.PURPOSE: Validate strict DTO, domain mapping, source revision, slide IDs/count, and score consistency

M-APP-COMMON.NAME: ApplicationCommon
M-APP-COMMON.purpose: Shared DTOs, errors, cancellation, observer, and service context for all stage services.

type-ServiceResult.PURPOSE: Typed success/failure result with stage, data, revision, and warnings

type-ProgressUpdate.PURPOSE: Validated percent and message for progress reporting

type-ServiceContext.PURPOSE: Bundles repository, observer, and cancellation for stage services

M-PORT-PREVIEW.NAME: PreviewAnalyzerPort
M-PORT-PREVIEW.purpose: Produce immutable preview score data without project or persistence mutation.

M-PORT-DETECTOR.NAME: SlideDetectorPort
M-PORT-DETECTOR.purpose: Return a complete immutable candidate slide set from video input.

M-PORT-ALIGNMENT.NAME: AlignmentPort
M-PORT-ALIGNMENT.purpose: Compute immutable alignment plans and metrics without aggregate mutation.

M-PORT-NOTES.NAME: NotesProcessorPort
M-PORT-NOTES.purpose: Produce basic or LLM notes while preserving raw subtitle cues.

M-PORT-EXPORT.NAME: PresentationExporterPort
M-PORT-EXPORT.purpose: Stage Markdown or PPTX output from immutable project snapshots.

M-APP-PREVIEW.NAME: PreviewService
M-APP-PREVIEW.purpose: Canonical waveform-only preview use case with revision-safe persistence and no slide invalidation.

M-PORT-EVENTS.name: EventBus
M-PORT-EVENTS.purpose: Synchronous event bus: publish domain events, notify subscribers. Adapter for Qt signals.

M-UPDATE-CHECKER.NAME: UpdateService
M-UPDATE-CHECKER.purpose: Application-layer update check: version comparison, channel filtering, PEP 440 semantics.

fn-check.PURPOSE: Compare current version against filtered releases, return result

fn-normalize_tag.PURPOSE: Strip v prefix, parse with packaging.version.Version

M-GITHUB-PROVIDER.NAME: GitHubReleaseProvider
M-GITHUB-PROVIDER.purpose: Fetch GitHub Releases API, parse into ReleaseInfo. No Qt, no GUI.

M-GUI-UPDATE-CTRL.NAME: UpdateController
M-GUI-UPDATE-CTRL.purpose: GUI adapter: orchestrate fetch→compare→dialog. No business logic.

fn-manual_check.PURPOSE: Force refresh from Help menu, show dialogs

CrossLink.relation: produces V2 DTO from V1 data
may invoke preview in full mode
dispatches MCP pipeline operations through application services
preserves canonical schema during GUI refresh and slide CRUD
compatibility entry point exports Typer app
shares canonical service composition with CLI
